query_text: Safety-I and Safety-II The Past and Future of Safety Management Hollnagel 2014
title: Safety-I and Safety-II
rationale: Resilience engineering; complements Reason's Human Error. Provides T02 with a contemporary systems safety anchor.

query_text: A Revision of Bloom's Taxonomy An Overview Krathwohl 2002 10.1207/s15430421tip4104_2
title: A Revision of Bloom's Taxonomy: An Overview
rationale: 7400+ citations. THE competency taxonomy in LE. One-hop will surface assessment design and learning objectives literature for T05 and T12.

query_text: Knowing What Students Know The Science and Design of Educational Assessment Pellegrino 2001
title: Knowing What Students Know
authors: Pellegrino JW, Chudowsky N, Glaser R
rationale: 2400+ citations. NRC report on evidence-centered design. Bridges assessment science and knowledge representation. One-hop will recover ECD and Bayesian network assessment literature.

query_text: A Brief Introduction to Evidence-Centered Design Mislevy 2003 10.1111/j.1745-3984.2003.tb01188.x
title: A Brief Introduction to Evidence-Centered Design
authors: Mislevy RJ, Almond RG, Lukas JF
rationale: 440+ citations. Competencies as evidence arguments. Behrens lineage. Provides T05 with its assessment-design anchor alongside Pellegrino.

query_text: Varieties of knowledge elicitation techniques Cooke 1994 10.1006/ijhc.1994.1083
title: Varieties of Knowledge Elicitation Techniques
rationale: 580+ citations. Canonical taxonomy of elicitation methods. One-hop will surface CTA, protocol analysis, and knowledge engineering literature for T09.

query_text: Learning Remembering and Understanding Chi Glaser expertise categorization
title: Learning, Remembering, and Understanding
rationale: 1400+ citations (2017 reprint). Foundational cognitive science of expertise and problem categorization by novices vs experts. Provides T09 with its cognitive-science anchor.

title: Understanding by Design
rationale: 2400+ citations. Most-used curriculum framework in K-12 LE. Backward design. Provides T12 with its foundational curriculum design anchor.

title: First Principles of Instruction
rationale: 2030+ citations. Distilled from all major ID theories. Saxberg cites. Provides T12 with its meta-theory anchor bridging CLT and ID.

query_text: Ten Steps to Complex Learning A Systematic Approach to Four-Component Instructional Design Van Merrienboer 2007
title: Ten Steps to Complex Learning
rationale: 580+ citations. 4C/ID model linking CLT to curriculum design. Provides T12 with its systematic design methodology anchor.
